hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight text-white/90

colors.background: Global background is already handled by body/dark mode. The .em-aurora animated background handles the visual aesthetic behind the content.

surfaces.glass: .em-glass (existing CSS class: backdrop-filter blur(28px), rgba(255,255,255,0.06) bg, specular shimmer top edge).
surfaces.inputs: bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 text-white placeholder-white/40 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/30

layout.page_structure: h-screen flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden bg-black
layout.background: Render the .em-aurora background fixed or absolute behind the main UI content.
layout.top_bar: flex justify-between items-center px-6 py-4 z-10 w-full relative
layout.tabs_row: flex justify-between items-end px-6 pt-16 pb-4 z-10 w-full relative

main_content.container: flex-1 px-6 pb-6 z-10 w-full flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-6 min-h-0
main_content.chat_panel: w-full lg:w-[35%] xl:w-[30%] flex flex-col h-full rounded-[2rem] overflow-hidden shadow-2xl transition-all duration-300
main_content.preview_panel: w-full lg:flex-1 flex flex-col h-full rounded-[2rem] overflow-hidden shadow-2xl transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(255,255,255,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors backdrop-blur-md
buttons.icon: p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 text-white/70 hover:text-white transition-colors backdrop-blur-sm
buttons.credits: flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-sm text-white/80 font-mono

tabs.active: px-5 py-2.5 bg-white/10 text-white rounded-t-xl border-b-[3px] border-white backdrop-blur-md font-medium shadow-[0_-10px_15px_-5px_rgba(255,255,255,0.05)]
tabs.inactive: px-5 py-2.5 text-white/50 hover:text-white/80 hover:bg-white/5 rounded-t-xl transition-colors font-medium border-b-[3px] border-transparent

chat_panel.header: px-6 py-4 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between
chat_panel.creative_brief_card: p-5 rounded-2xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md mb-6 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors cursor-pointer
chat_panel.chip: px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-sm text-white/70 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white hover:border-white/20 cursor-pointer transition-all whitespace-nowrap
chat_panel.input_box: w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-[1.5rem] p-4 text-white placeholder-white/40 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/30 resize-none overflow-hidden
chat_panel.visual_mode_toggle: flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 bg-black/40 rounded-full border border-white/10 mt-3
chat_panel.toggle_option: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium cursor-pointer transition-colors

preview_panel.header_toolbar: absolute top-0 right-0 p-4 flex gap-2 z-20
preview_panel.iframe_container: flex-1 w-full bg-[#0A0A0A] overflow-hidden relative rounded-b-[2rem]
preview_panel.skeleton: absolute inset-0 bg-white/5 animate-pulse flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white/30 gap-4
preview_panel.blank_detection_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm flex flex-col items-center justify-center z-10 text-center p-8

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5, text-white/70 default, text-white on hover.

motion.glass_shimmer: The .em-glass class handles the specular shimmer.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure sufficient contrast. Text over the dark aurora background should use text-white.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, e.g. data-testid='chat-input', data-testid='deploy-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Redesign the entire Dashboard.jsx / Layout to feature a full-screen application layout with generous top spacing (e.g. pt-16) for the existing .em-aurora background to visibly show through the space above the panels.
Make the background entirely black with the .em-aurora animated veils floating behind the content. Do not use opaque backgrounds for the main wrappers.
Implement the Top Bar containing the Logo (left), Credits counter, Buy Credits button, Import button, Search icon, and User avatar (right). Use the provided user_avatar image_url.
Below the top bar, implement the Tabs Row containing Project Bin, Project tabs (left) and the Preview Toolbar (right) with buttons: Open in New Tab, Refresh, Share, Deploy, Close.

The main content area should contain two side-by-side modules (LeftPanel and RightPanel) taking up the remaining height (flex-1 min-h-0). Both panels MUST use the existing .em-glass class and have large rounded corners (rounded-[2rem]).

LeftPanel (Chat) should be narrower (around 30-35% width). It needs to surface the Creative Brief Card prominently at the top of the chat area, followed by Suggestion Chips, a message list, and a modern ChatComposer at the bottom containing a Visual Mode toggle.
RightPanel (Preview) should be wider (remaining width). It contains a live iframe container. Add a premium skeleton loading state and blank detection overlay using absolute positioning.

Make sure the CSS properties in .em-glass dictate the glossy/transparent panels visually similar to the 'sign in page module'. Ensure the styling aligns with the Jewel & Luxury (Neon Glassmorphism) archetype.

Do NOT create the components from scratch entirely if they exist, but DO rewrite the JSX of LeftPanel.jsx, RightPanel.jsx, ChatComposer.jsx, and PreviewTab.jsx to conform to this premium layout and the layout classes provided in this JSON.
Make sure all interactive and key informational elements have a data-testid attribute.
